title: LiftOn v1.0.9
description: LiftOn is a homology-based genome-annotation lift-over tool. Given a reference genome, its annotation, and a target genome, LiftOn produces an annotation for the target by combining DNA-level alignment (Liftoff / minimap2) with protein-level alignment (miniprot) and merging the two via a two-step protein-maximization algorithm (a chaining algorithm plus an ORF-search rescue). Release v1.0.9 adds a default-on miniprot-only rescue pass that recovers reference coding genes the DNA lift misses entirely (improving recall on distant species lift-overs), automatic lifting of all gene-like top-level parent types, optional output validation, and multi-threaded per-locus processing.
